commands.review_summary:
The PR removes voice-call runtime JSONL call-log reads and writes, adds a doctor migration from `calls.jsonl` into plugin-state SQLite, and updates voice-call store, restore, and webhook tests.

PR surface: Source +253, Tests +221. Total +474 across 7 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: seed 1000 existing SQLite call events plus a newer `calls.jsonl` entry, and the PR’s `eventRoom` calculation prunes the legacy entry before archiving the source. I did not execute tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Manual handling is needed because the PR has an upgrade-sensitive P2 migration bug and lacks real behavior proof; no automated repair marker should be requested while contributor proof is missing.

target.title: refactor: migrate voice-call call logs through doctor
target.body:
## Summary

- remove voice-call runtime reads/writes/imports for legacy `calls.jsonl`; runtime now persists call records through plugin-state SQLite only
- add a voice-call doctor state migration that imports legacy `calls.jsonl` into plugin state, archives completed sources, leaves malformed/incomplete sources retryable, and prunes over-capacity logs to the newest records
- keep oversized call snapshots restorable by trimming transcript payloads inside SQLite storage while preserving metadata, and update manager/webhook tests for the required state runtime

## Verification

- `pnpm test extensions/voice-call/src/manager/store.test.ts extensions/voice-call/src/manager.restore.test.ts extensions/voice-call/doctor-contract-api.test.ts extensions/voice-call/src/webhook.hangup-once.lifecycle.test.ts extensions/voice-call/src/manager.closed-loop.test.ts extensions/voice-call/src/manager.notify.test.ts extensions/voice-call/src/manager.inbound-allowlist.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.extensions.json extensions/voice-call`
- `node scripts/check-extension-package-tsc-boundary.mjs --mode=compile`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local` -> clean, no accepted/actionable findings
target.author: steipete
